name: pkup-gen
description: Claude Code skill for generating PKUP (Podwyższone Koszty Uzyskania Przychodu) reports from GitHub commits
author: pPrecel

skills.name: pkup-gen

skills.name: pkup-enchant
skills.description: Enrich an existing PKUP report — group commits into tasks, filter non-creative work, and write Polish descriptions
